Convenience wrapper to run the main function from the source tree.

# Purpose
This script serves as a convenience wrapper to execute the `main` function from the `pblconvert.pblconvert` module directly from the source tree. It uses the `if __name__ == '__main__':` construct to ensure that the `main` function is called only when the script is executed as the main program, not when it is imported as a module. The script includes a shebang line (`#!/usr/bin/env python`) to specify the Python interpreter and a UTF-8 encoding declaration for compatibility. This setup allows users to run the `pblconvert` functionality without needing to navigate to the module's directory or import it explicitly in another script.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `pblconvert.pblconvert.main`
